label: Infrastructure Pak
blurb: Specialized Engineering, QA & ML Ops. Software stability and advanced data ops.

skills.label: Api Breaking Change Detector
skills.method: Compares the new API code against the old OpenAPI spec before deployment. If a required field is removed, it blocks the merge.
trigger_examples: prevents backend devs from breaking mobile apps

skills.label: Flaky Test Quarantiner
skills.method: Identifies unit tests that pass 90% of the time but fail randomly due to race conditions. Mutes them, flags them for review, and allows the CI/CD pipeline to continue.
trigger_examples: stops developers from ignoring the build pipeline

skills.label: Web Accessibility Dom Fixer
skills.method: Scans the React DOM, automatically adds missing `aria-labels`, contrast fixes, and keyboard navigation tab-indexes, then submits a PR.

skills.label: Load Test Script Generator
skills.method: Translates a user journey (login -\> add to cart -\> checkout) into a complex Artillery/JMeter script to simulate 10,000 concurrent users.

skills.label: Infrastructure As Code Drifter
skills.method: Detects if a developer manually clicked a button in the AWS console to change a firewall, and automatically writes the Terraform code to match it (or reverts it).

skills.label: Chaos Engineering Monkey
skills.method: Randomly terminates non-critical pods in Kubernetes during staging to ensure the system's failover architecture actually works.
trigger_examples: proves system resilience before black friday

skills.label: Database Index Fragmentation Resolver
skills.method: Monitors SQL/Postgres indexes; if fragmentation hits 30%, it automatically schedules and runs an `INDEX REBUILD` during off-peak hours.
trigger_examples: keeps massive databases running smoothly without dbas

skills.label: Data Warehouse Cost Optimizer
skills.method: Scans Snowflake/BigQuery usage. If a massive table is queried once a month, it rewrites the architecture to move it to cheap cold storage.

skills.label: Ml Feature Store Populator
skills.method: Writes the complex ETL pipelines required to take raw application data and transform it into clean features for machine learning models.
trigger_examples: unblocks data scientists who are terrible at data engineering
